3 Wherefore, go ye and preach my gospel, whether to the north or to the south, to the east or to the west, it mattereth not, for ye cannot go amiss.
And the Lord said to Abram, after that Lot had separated from him, Lift up now thine eyes, and look, from the place where thou art, to the north and to the south, to the east and to the west:
Adonoy said to Avram after Lot had separated from him: Raise your eyes and look about from the place where you are, to the north, to the south to the east and to the west.
3 Wherefore, go ye and preach my gospel, whether to the north or to the south, to the east or to the west, it mattereth not, for ye cannot go amiss.

The Holy Land or Palestine, The Land of Jerusalem. "This is the land ye shall divide by lot unto the tribes of Israel for inheritance, and these are their portion, saith the Lord God." (Ezekiel 47:13 to 48:29) (George Reynolds and Janne M. Sjodahl, Commentary on the Book of Mormon, edited and arranged by Philip C. Reynolds, 7 vols., 7:, p.78)

tribes. “From the north’ end to the coast of the way of Hethlon, as one goeth to Hamath, Hazar-enan, the border of Damascus northward, to the coast of Hamath; for these are as bese east and west; pa portion for

On the east three gates. Ezekiel recorded, "And at the east side . . . three gates; and one gate of Joseph, one gate of Benjamin, one gate of Dan" (Ezek. 48:32). on the north three gates. Ezekiel wrote, "And the gates of the city shall be after the names of the tribes of Israel: three gates northward; one gate of Reuben, one gate of Judah, one gate of Levi" (Ezek. 48:31). on the south three…

Ezekiel wrote, "And the gates of the city shall be after the names of the tribes of Israel: three gates northward; one gate of Reuben, one gate of Judah, one gate of Levi" (Ezek. 48:31). on the south three…
